01

Background

I'm a product leader with over a decade in fintech and AI — from payments infrastructure at Grab and financial compliance AI at VoxSmart, to leading real-time communications at Parloa, a conversational AI platform.

On the side, I build things. AI-native apps, trading tools, property tech — whatever problem I find interesting enough to ship. The projects below span from consumer health apps to multi-agent AI systems.

I also consult through IOAO Consulting, working with PE firms and Series A+ founders on fintech strategy, AI automation, and international expansion.

AI Accounting Solution

AI-native accountancy firm targeting UK sole traders and micro-LTDs. Dual D2C and B2B distribution, nine-agent back-office model, with MTD for Income Tax as the forcing function. Full brand, PRD, and nine-agent architecture built out.
